# Seankrix Technologies

> Seankrix Technologies is a leading Website Development and Software Development Company in India, specializing in custom web applications, eCommerce solutions, mobile app development, SEO, UI/UX design, cloud solutions, and AI-powered software development.

Website: https://seankrixtechnologies.com
Company: Seankrix Technologies
Email: info@seankrixtechnologies.com
Phone: +91 88247 44976

## About

Seankrix Technologies helps startups, small businesses, and enterprises build scalable digital products using modern technologies like React.js, Next.js, Node.js, Laravel, NestJS, TypeScript, MongoDB, MySQL, AWS, and cloud platforms.

## Services

- Website Development
- Custom Web Application Development
- eCommerce Website Development
- Mobile App Development
- UI/UX Design
- SEO Optimization
- Cloud Solutions
- API Integration
- CRM Development
- ERP Development
- AI-Powered Business Solutions
- Software Development
- Business Automation
